patient.query: I remember times when I’d just zone out, caught up in my own worries, and I’d see them trying to reach out. I’d think things like, “I need to focus on my own stuff first.” But then, I’d look back and wonder if they needed me, and I wasn’t there. It’s like a loop of feeling unworthy or not good enough, and then it just makes everything heavier.

triggers: seeing them trying to reach out

they needed me, and I wasn’t there
I feel unworthy
I feel not good enough
